title: Better Than a Gen 3?
caption: What are your feelings on the new Gen 6 Glocks? Will you be purchasing one in the future or have you already?

title: DOJ Files Two Suits in 48 Hours to Challenge Anti-2A Policies in Colorado
caption: It has been so refreshing to see the efforts to combat the anti-2a legislation around the country. Fighting fire with fire!

title: Armed Protesters: The 2nd Amendment Defends the 1st
caption: The 2nd amendment serves as the safeguard for the first amendment. Firearms give physical protection to those who wish to speak truth to power without undue harm. Without the right to bear arms, free speech lacks its strongest constitutional shield. We stand with you.

title: Don’t just carry—carry with the ultimate backup.
caption: When it comes to your family’s safety, “good enough” isn’t enough. At Right to Bear, we don’t just provide legal protection; we provide Pure Peace of Mind. We are the most family-oriented defense association because we believe your right to protect your loved ones should never be compromised by legal red tape. Whether you’re at home or on the go, we are always there when it matters most. Don’t just carry—carry with the ultimate backup.

title: ATF Rule Changes Aplenty
caption: Have you kept up with the recent rule updates from the ATF? We’re hopeful that all of the changes come to life! Hit our blog section on the website (link in bio) to read all about it!
